title: Creating Bulleted Lists in "Updates"
excerpt:
Creating bulleted lists in the updates section is not smooth. 
Would be very helpful if bulleted lists functioned identical to MSoft Word.

posts.author: brennang11 (Brennan Garcia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Creating bulleted lists in the updates section is not smooth.

Would be very helpful if bulleted lists functioned identical to MSoft Word.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @brennang11 and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

How are you creating these billeted lists? Using the UI or via API?

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: NancyP (Nancy Pass)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m experiencing the same problem with bulleted lists in the documents offered through Monday. I’m able to indent bullets to the right as sub-bullets just by clicking the “tab” key on my keyboard as you would in Microsoft Word.
However, if I want to transition from a sub-bullet to a higher level bullet point, I’m unable to do so. In Microsoft Word, I’m able to transition my next bullet to a higher level bullet by clicking the “backspace” key on my keyboard. If I do so in Monday, the text removes the bullet all together.

posts.author: SeanM (Sean)
posts.cookedHtml:
i know its a hell of a long time but you can go back to upper level by using SHIFT+TAB.

shame that a monday member dit not responds to you.
